name: query-ast-core
description: Implement parser, custom operators, and serialization for query AST
acceptanceCriteria: parser.ts: createQueryParser(options) factory accepts custom operator config
parser.ts: defaultParser instance includes $contains custom operator
parser.ts: parseQuery(filter) convenience function uses defaultParser
operators.ts: containsInstruction defines $contains as field-type operator
operators.ts: getCustomParsingInstructions() returns all custom operators
serialization.ts: serializeCondition(ast) converts AST to JSON-safe format
serialization.ts: deserializeCondition(json) reconstructs AST from JSON
serialization.ts: RegExp handled via $regex/$options format (not native RegExp)
Parser uses MongoQueryParser from @ucast/mongo with allParsingInstructions
All parsing errors throw descriptive error messages
